descriptors: overlay sprite technique for enhanced color depth
tile-based level design with 32x21 room dimensions
repair lab screen with damage progression graphics
distinctive_elements: title screen uses overlay sprites to increase picture color depth
sprite palette color management with background palette conflicts
nametable filling system for level scrolling
HUD tilemap message system with indexed strings
damage state graphics for character body parts (arms, legs)

notes.technical_constraints: Game ran out of free background tile space (256 tiles maximum); overlay sprites used as workaround for color depth enhancement
notes.sprite_buffer_issue: Program cannot track sprite buffer count, causing overwrites of final overlay sprites with repair tank sprites
notes.room_structure: Level rooms stored as 32x21 tilemaps + 48 bytes attributes data; unused empty black tilemap at level end for nametable padding
notes.unused_elements: Unused graphics include drug reference sign, belly overlay sprites, damage graphics for left palm, additional leg damage line
